dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6673 IH: To amend title 49, United States Code, to clarify airport revenue use of local general sales taxes, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. David Scott of Georgia introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To amend title 49, United States Code, to clarify airport revenue use of local general sales taxes, and for other purposes.

section.header: Amendments to title 49, United States Code

subsection.text: Section 47107(b) of title 49, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: This subsection does not apply to local general sales taxes as provided in section 47133(b)(4).

subsection.text: Section 47133(b) of title 49, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply to revenues from generally applicable sales taxes imposed by a local government provided—

subparagraph.text: the local government had a generally applicable sales tax that did not exclude aviation fuel in effect prior to December 9, 2014;
the local government is not a sponsor of a public airport; and
a large hub airport, which had more than 35,000,000 enplanements in calendar year 2021, is located within the jurisdiction of the local government.
